overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy suburban street at night in a video game environment (resembling GTA V). The camera moves steadily along a wet sidewalk lined with palm trees and ornate street lamps, passing residential houses with illuminated windows and approaching an intersection with passing traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with palm tree canopy

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-soaked sidewalk past a residential house with warm illuminated windows and landscaped bushes

entered.detail: black victorian-style street lamp post with glowing light
tall palm trees lining the right side of the street with dense fronds
single-story house with warm yellow window lights and illuminated white landscaping bushes
rain-slicked concrete pavement reflecting street lamp light
multi-lane asphalt road with wet surface and distant vehicle lights
narrow strip of grass between sidewalk and road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy suburban night scene with the camera walking along a wet sidewalk. An ornate street lamp stands prominently in the foreground while a residential house with illuminated windows glows warmly on the right. Palm trees line the street and distant vehicle headlights are visible through the rain and fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk approaching intersection with utility bins

events.description: black trash bins appear on the right side of the sidewalk
vehicle headlights approach and become more prominent on the left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past trash bins, approaching an intersection with increasing traffic visibility through the rain

entered.detail: black utility trash bins lined up on the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The camera passes black trash bins on the right as the residential house recedes behind. The street lamp moves to the left background while palm trees now dominate the right foreground. Vehicle headlights become more prominent through the heavy rain as the intersection approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection corner with brick building

events.description: vehicles pass by on the left side of the road, headlights cutting through the rain
transition from residential sidewalk to intersection corner with brick building facade

agents.ego_description: walking through the intersection area as vehicles pass by on the wet road to the left, passing a brick building on the right

notable_agents.action: car driving past on the wet asphalt, headlights illuminating the rain and creating reflections on the road surface

entered.detail: red brick building with dark roof and illuminated windows on the corner
white painted stripes marking the pedestrian crossing on the road

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider intersection area with a brick building now prominent on the right. Vehicles pass by on the left with headlights cutting through the heavy rain. The camera moves over crosswalk markings as palm trees shift to the left side, and the street lamp reappears in the distance ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through a rainy suburban neighborhood that gradually opens into a busy urban intersection. It begins on a wet sidewalk beside an ornate street lamp, passing a residential house with warmly illuminated windows while palm trees line the street under a veil of rain and fog. As the camera moves forward, the house recedes and the street lamp shifts to the background, giving way to black trash bins and towering palm trees that dominate the right foreground. The scene then expands into a wider intersection where the residential feel shifts toward a brick building on the right and vehicle headlights cut sharply through the heavy rain on the left. Finally, the camera glides over white crosswalk markings as the palm trees shift to the left and another street lamp appears in the distance ahead.
